groups.name: app.mail
groups.description: Mail delivery toggles for the backend.

groups.name: app.ai-ingest
groups.description: Durable internal baseball-to-AI ingestion scheduling and status monitoring settings.

groups.name: app.client-error-monitoring
groups.description: Client error monitoring retention and alerting settings.

groups.name: app.dev-db.hot-path-prewarm
groups.description: Opt-in Dev DB hot-path connection and planner pre-warm controls.

groups.name: app.frontend
groups.description: Frontend URL settings used by the backend.

groups.name: app.baseball.manual-data
groups.description: Operator-provided manual baseball data failure controls.

groups.name: app.home
groups.description: Home page bootstrap and latency settings.

groups.name: app.home.bootstrap.warmup
groups.description: Scheduled home bootstrap cache warm-up settings.

groups.name: app.prediction
groups.description: Prediction page bootstrap and warm-up settings.

groups.name: app.prediction.warmup.vote-status
groups.description: Prediction aggregate vote status warm-up settings.

groups.name: app.ai.proxy
groups.description: AI proxy exposure and timeout settings.

groups.name: ai.moderation
groups.description: AI moderation keyword and threshold settings.

groups.name: spring.jwt
groups.description: JWT settings stored under the spring namespace.

properties.name: spring.jwt.secret
properties.description: JWT signing secret.

properties.name: spring.jwt.access-expiration
properties.description: JWT access token lifetime in milliseconds.

properties.name: spring.jwt.refresh-expiration
properties.description: JWT refresh token lifetime in milliseconds.

properties.name: app.mail.enabled
properties.description: Whether outbound mail sending is enabled.

properties.name: app.ai-ingest.enabled
properties.description: Whether the backend registers the single recurring AI ingestion submission job.

properties.name: app.ai-ingest.cron
properties.description: Five-field JobRunr cron expression for recurring ingestion submission.

properties.name: app.ai-ingest.tables
properties.description: Explicit trusted internal source tables submitted to the AI ingestion queue.

properties.name: app.ai-ingest.season-year
properties.description: Optional operator-selected season year; unset means no inferred season filter.

properties.name: app.ai-ingest.check-interval
properties.description: Delay between separately persisted JobRunr status checks.

properties.name: app.ai-ingest.monitoring-duration
properties.description: Maximum backend monitoring window for a submitted durable ingestion run.

properties.name: app.client-error-monitoring.retention-days
properties.description: Number of days to retain client error monitoring data.

properties.name: app.client-error-monitoring.cleanup-cron
properties.description: Cron expression for cleaning up expired client error monitoring data.

properties.name: app.client-error-monitoring.alerts.enabled
properties.description: Whether backend-driven client error alert delivery is enabled.

properties.name: app.client-error-monitoring.alerts.poll-interval-ms
properties.description: Polling interval in milliseconds for evaluating client error alert thresholds.

properties.name: app.client-error-monitoring.alerts.runtime-threshold
properties.description: Runtime fingerprint count threshold within the configured window.

properties.name: app.client-error-monitoring.alerts.api5xx-threshold
properties.description: API 5xx fingerprint count threshold within the configured window.

properties.name: app.client-error-monitoring.alerts.window-minutes
properties.description: Rolling window size in minutes for client error threshold evaluation.

properties.name: app.client-error-monitoring.alerts.cooldown-minutes
properties.description: Cooldown period in minutes before the same fingerprint can alert again.

properties.name: app.client-error-monitoring.alerts.max-candidates
properties.description: Maximum alert candidate fingerprints evaluated per polling cycle.

properties.name: app.client-error-monitoring.alerts.channel
properties.description: Alert delivery channel used for backend-driven client error alerts.

properties.name: app.client-error-monitoring.alerts.telegram.bot-token
properties.description: Telegram bot token used for backend-driven client error alerts.

properties.name: app.client-error-monitoring.alerts.telegram.chat-id
properties.description: Telegram chat id used for backend-driven client error alerts.

properties.name: app.dev-data.enabled
properties.description: Whether development seed data should be initialized.

properties.name: app.dev-db.hot-path-prewarm.enabled
properties.description: Whether to run opt-in Dev DB hot-path pre-warm queries after application startup.

properties.name: app.dev-db.hot-path-prewarm.connections
properties.description: Number of physical connections to pre-warm per relevant datasource. The service caps this value defensively.

properties.name: app.dev-db.hot-path-prewarm.timeout-ms
properties.description: Statement timeout in milliseconds for each Dev DB hot-path pre-warm query.

properties.name: app.dev-db.hot-path-prewarm.login-email
properties.description: Email value used for the login lookup pre-warm query.

properties.name: app.dev-db.hot-path-prewarm.range-start-date
properties.description: Start date used by the game range pre-warm query.

properties.name: app.dev-db.hot-path-prewarm.range-end-date
properties.description: End date used by the game range pre-warm query.

properties.name: app.dev-db.hot-path-prewarm.season-id
properties.description: KBO season id used by the season lookup pre-warm query.

properties.name: app.frontend.url
properties.description: Public frontend URL used in generated links and redirects.

properties.name: app.backend.url
properties.description: Public backend URL.

properties.name: app.baseball.manual-data.required-dates
properties.description: Comma-separated YYYY-MM-DD dates that should fail fast with MANUAL_BASEBALL_DATA_REQUIRED until operator data is approved.

properties.name: app.home.bootstrap.section-timeout-ms
properties.description: Maximum wait time per home bootstrap section before returning that section's fallback payload.

properties.name: app.home.bootstrap.warmup.enabled
properties.description: Whether the backend periodically warms the server-today home bootstrap cache.

properties.name: app.home.bootstrap.warmup.fixed-delay-ms
properties.description: Fixed delay in milliseconds between home bootstrap warm-up attempts.

properties.name: app.home.bootstrap.warmup.initial-delay-ms
properties.description: Initial delay in milliseconds before the first home bootstrap warm-up attempt.

properties.name: app.home.bootstrap.warmup.max-attempts
properties.description: Maximum number of home bootstrap refresh attempts per scheduled warm-up run.

properties.name: app.home.bootstrap.warmup.partial-retry-delay-ms
properties.description: Delay in milliseconds before retrying a partial home bootstrap warm-up response.

properties.name: app.home.bootstrap.warmup.section-timeout-ms
properties.description: Maximum wait time per home bootstrap section during scheduled warm-up refresh.

properties.name: app.home.bootstrap.warmup.ranking.enabled
properties.description: Whether home bootstrap warm-up should also warm the ranking snapshot.

properties.name: app.home.widgets.section-timeout-ms
properties.description: Maximum wait time per home widgets section before returning that section's fallback payload.

properties.name: app.leaderboard.game-result-scheduler.enabled
properties.description: Whether scheduled leaderboard game-result scoring jobs should run.

properties.name: app.leaderboard.game-result-scheduler.fixed-delay-ms
properties.description: Fixed delay in milliseconds between leaderboard game-result scoring runs.

properties.name: app.leaderboard.game-result-scheduler.initial-delay-ms
properties.description: Initial delay in milliseconds before the first leaderboard game-result scoring run.

properties.name: app.leaderboard.game-result-scheduler.yesterday-cron
properties.description: Cron expression for the previous-day leaderboard game-result scoring run.

properties.name: app.cheer.post-sync.scheduler.enabled
properties.description: Whether cheer post-sync recurring JobRunr jobs should be registered on startup.

properties.name: app.prediction.warmup.enabled
properties.description: Whether the backend periodically warms server-today prediction schedule data.

properties.name: app.prediction.warmup.fixed-delay-ms
properties.description: Fixed delay in milliseconds between prediction warm-up attempts.

properties.name: app.prediction.warmup.initial-delay-ms
properties.description: Initial delay in milliseconds before the first prediction warm-up attempt.

properties.name: app.prediction.warmup.detail.enabled
properties.description: Whether prediction warm-up should load game detail resources.

properties.name: app.prediction.warmup.vote-status.enabled
properties.description: Whether prediction warm-up should load aggregate vote status resources.

properties.name: app.prediction.warmup.max-games-per-run
properties.description: Maximum number of games to warm per prediction warm-up run. A value of 0 means no limit.

properties.name: app.prediction.bootstrap.resource-max-concurrency
properties.description: Maximum concurrent prediction bootstrap detail and vote-status resource loaders.

properties.name: app.prediction.bootstrap.resource-permit-wait-timeout-ms
properties.description: Maximum time in milliseconds a prediction bootstrap resource loader waits for a bulkhead permit.

properties.name: app.cheer.feed.enrichment.max-concurrency
properties.description: Maximum concurrent cheer feed enrichment operations.

properties.name: app.cheer.feed.enrichment.permit-wait-timeout-ms
properties.description: Maximum time in milliseconds a cheer feed enrichment task waits for a bulkhead permit.

properties.name: app.cheer.feed.enrichment.task-timeout-ms
properties.description: Maximum time in milliseconds a cheer feed request waits for an enrichment result before using fallback data.

properties.name: app.flyway.auto-repair
properties.description: Whether application-level Flyway repair should be enabled.

properties.name: app.tomcat.connection-upload-timeout-ms
properties.description: Socket read timeout in milliseconds while Tomcat is reading a request body upload.

properties.name: app.tomcat.upload-timeout-enabled
properties.description: Whether the backend enables Tomcat's separate upload body read timeout.

properties.name: app.ai.proxy.public-in-dev
properties.description: Whether the AI proxy can be exposed without authentication in dev.

properties.name: app.ai.proxy.request-timeout-seconds
properties.description: Request timeout for proxied AI calls in seconds.

properties.name: app.ai.proxy.stream-header-timeout-seconds
properties.description: Header wait timeout for proxied AI streaming calls in seconds.

properties.name: app.ai.proxy.max-concurrent-streams
properties.description: Maximum concurrent backend AI streaming proxy responses before returning 503.

properties.name: app.ai.proxy.max-connections
properties.description: Maximum Reactor Netty connections reserved for backend AI proxy upstream calls.

properties.name: app.ai.proxy.pending-acquire-timeout-ms
properties.description: Maximum time in milliseconds to wait for a backend AI proxy upstream connection from the dedicated pool.

properties.name: app.ai.proxy.pending-acquire-max-count
properties.description: Maximum queued backend AI proxy upstream connection acquire requests.

properties.name: app.ai.proxy.health-timeout-ms
properties.description: Timeout for the backend AI upstream health check in milliseconds.

properties.name: app.ai.proxy.allow-loopback-service-url-in-prod
properties.description: Whether prod profile may use a loopback AI service URL.

properties.name: app.ai.proxy.max-chat-json-bytes
properties.description: Maximum JSON request body size for backend AI chat proxy endpoints.

properties.name: app.ai.proxy.max-coach-json-bytes
properties.description: Maximum JSON request body size for backend AI coach analyze proxy endpoint.

properties.name: app.ai.proxy.max-voice-upload-bytes
properties.description: Maximum multipart file size accepted by backend AI voice proxy endpoint.

properties.name: app.ai.proxy.max-voice-request-bytes
properties.description: Maximum multipart request envelope size accepted by backend AI voice proxy endpoint.

properties.name: app.ai.proxy.max-admin-json-bytes
properties.description: Maximum JSON request body size for backend admin AI proxy endpoints.

properties.name: app.ai.proxy.max-chat-persistence-json-bytes
properties.description: Maximum JSON request body size for backend AI chat persistence endpoints.

properties.name: app.trusted-proxies
properties.description: Comma-separated trusted proxy IPs or CIDRs.

properties.name: app.auth.reject-legacy-access-tokens
properties.description: Reject JWTs that lack a token_type claim (legacy tokens) instead of treating them as access tokens. Default true.

properties.name: app.allowed-origins
properties.description: Comma-separated list of allowed CORS origins.

properties.name: app.allow-preview-origins
properties.description: Whether preview deployment origins are accepted.

properties.name: app.cookie.secure
properties.description: Whether auth cookies are marked secure.

properties.name: app.policy.hard-gate-approved-date
properties.description: Policy hard-gate approval date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

properties.name: app.oauth2.cookie-secret
properties.description: Secret used to sign OAuth2 authorization request cookies.

properties.name: baseball.datasource.driver-class-name
properties.description: JDBC driver class name for the secondary datasource.

properties.name: baseball.datasource.url
properties.description: JDBC URL for the secondary datasource.

properties.name: baseball.datasource.username
properties.description: Username for the secondary datasource.

properties.name: baseball.datasource.password
properties.description: Password for the secondary datasource.

properties.name: baseball.datasource.hikari.maximum-pool-size
properties.description: Maximum pool size for the secondary datasource.

properties.name: baseball.datasource.hikari.minimum-idle
properties.description: Minimum idle connections for the secondary datasource.

properties.name: baseball.datasource.hikari.connection-timeout
properties.description: Connection timeout in milliseconds for the secondary datasource.

properties.name: baseball.datasource.hikari.validation-timeout
properties.description: Validation timeout in milliseconds for the secondary datasource.

properties.name: baseball.datasource.hikari.idle-timeout
properties.description: Idle timeout in milliseconds for the secondary datasource.

properties.name: baseball.datasource.hikari.max-lifetime
properties.description: Maximum lifetime in milliseconds for secondary datasource connections.

properties.name: baseball.datasource.hikari.keepalive-time
properties.description: Keepalive interval in milliseconds for the secondary datasource.

properties.name: baseball.datasource.data-source-properties.currentSchema
properties.description: Default schema for the secondary datasource.

properties.name: baseball.datasource.data-source-properties.targetServerType
properties.description: Preferred PostgreSQL server type for the secondary datasource.

properties.name: baseball.jpa.hibernate.ddl-auto
properties.description: Hibernate DDL mode for the secondary datasource.

properties.name: kbo.schema-guard.strict
properties.description: Whether strict KBO schema validation is enforced on startup.

properties.name: kbo.game.db.enabled
properties.description: Whether the dedicated KBO game database stack is enabled.

properties.name: storage.type
properties.description: Storage strategy identifier.

properties.name: oci.s3.access-key
properties.description: OCI S3 access key.

properties.name: oci.s3.secret-key
properties.description: OCI S3 secret key.

properties.name: oci.s3.endpoint
properties.description: OCI S3 endpoint URL.

properties.name: oci.s3.region
properties.description: OCI S3 region.

properties.name: oci.s3.bucket
properties.description: OCI S3 bucket name.

properties.name: ai.service-url
properties.description: Base URL for the AI service.

properties.name: ai.internal-token
properties.description: Shared internal token for backend-to-AI service requests.

properties.name: ai.moderation.high-risk-keywords
properties.description: Comma-separated high-risk moderation keywords.

properties.name: ai.moderation.spam-keywords
properties.description: Comma-separated spam moderation keywords.

properties.name: ai.moderation.spam-url-threshold
properties.description: URL count threshold for spam detection.

properties.name: ai.moderation.repeat-char-threshold
properties.description: Repeated character threshold for spam detection.

properties.name: ai.moderation.spam-medium-threshold
properties.description: Score threshold for medium spam classification.

properties.name: ai.moderation.spam-block-threshold
properties.description: Score threshold for blocking spam.

properties.name: toss.payment.secret-key
properties.description: Toss payment API secret key.

properties.name: toss.payment.confirm-url
properties.description: Toss payment confirmation endpoint.

properties.name: toss.payment.cancel-url
properties.description: Toss payment cancellation endpoint.

properties.name: toss.payout.api-secret
properties.description: Toss payout API secret.

properties.name: toss.payout.base-url
properties.description: Base URL for Toss payout API calls.

properties.name: toss.payout.request-path
properties.description: Relative path for creating a payout.

properties.name: toss.payout.status-path
properties.description: Relative path for fetching payout status.

properties.name: toss.payout.seller-register-path
properties.description: Relative path for registering sellers.

properties.name: toss.payout.security-mode
properties.description: Security mode used for payout requests.

properties.name: toss.payout.encryption-public-key
properties.description: Inline public key used for payout encryption.

properties.name: toss.payout.encryption-public-key-path
properties.description: Filesystem path to the payout encryption public key.

properties.name: mate.auth.require-social-verification
properties.description: Whether mate actions require a verified social account.

properties.name: mate.payment.mode
properties.description: Selected mate payment mode.

properties.name: mate.payment.deposit-amount
properties.description: Deposit amount for mate payments.

properties.name: mate.payment.intent-ttl-minutes
properties.description: TTL in minutes for mate payment intents.

properties.name: mate.payment.fee-rate
properties.description: Fee rate applied to mate payments.

properties.name: payment.selling.enforced
properties.description: Whether selling-related payment rules are enforced.

properties.name: payment.payout.enabled
properties.description: Whether payout flows are enabled.

properties.name: payment.payout.provider
properties.description: Selected payout provider.

properties.name: media.cleanup.enabled
properties.description: Whether the media cleanup scheduler should run.

properties.name: media.cleanup.fixed-delay-ms
properties.description: Fixed delay in milliseconds between media cleanup scheduler runs.

properties.name: media.cleanup.batch-size
properties.description: Maximum number of media assets each cleanup path scans per scheduler run.

properties.name: org.jobrunr.background-job-server.enabled
properties.description: Whether the JobRunr background job server should run.

properties.name: org.jobrunr.background-job-server.worker-count
properties.description: Worker count for the JobRunr background job server.

properties.name: org.jobrunr.dashboard.enabled
properties.description: Whether the JobRunr dashboard should run.

properties.name: spring.datasource.data-source-properties.currentSchema
properties.description: Default schema for the primary datasource.

properties.name: spring.datasource.data-source-properties.targetServerType
properties.description: Preferred PostgreSQL server type for the primary datasource.

properties.name: management.health.jobrunr.enabled
properties.description: Whether the JobRunr health contributor is enabled.
